name: r1pro_left_arm_move_to_pose
description: Move the left arm TCP to an absolute MuJoCo world pose using Pinocchio IK.

parameters.target_x: Absolute target x position in MuJoCo world coordinates.
parameters.target_y: Absolute target y position in MuJoCo world coordinates.
parameters.target_z: Absolute target z position in MuJoCo world coordinates.
parameters.target_quat_wxyz: Target orientation as a unit quaternion in wxyz order.
parameters.orientation_weight: Optional orientation weight when solving pose IK.
parameters.orientation_threshold: Optional orientation success threshold in radians.
